# Residual Labs

> A deep-tech engineering lab that builds proof-grade tools for problems that can't
> afford to be wrong. We don't pitch — we prove. Founded and led by a Principal
> Engineer working in systems & verification. Based in France; work shipped in English.

Residual Labs builds **proof-grade tools**: precision instruments that are deterministic,
run offline with no API key, and never claim more than they can prove. Our flagship,
**SPARDA**, is the trust layer for AI-written code — it compiles a backend into a
deterministic behavior graph and proves what the code can and can't break before it
ships (no unguarded mutation, no removed auth guard, no broken invariant). SPARDA is the
first instrument, not the last: Residual Labs exists to solve strong pains, one at a
time, wherever getting it wrong is not an option.

The pain we own: **AI writes code faster than anyone can verify it.** We make
verification run at the speed of the machines writing the code — and it never shows a
false green.

## Flagship — SPARDA

- [SPARDA on GitHub](https://github.com/zyx77550/sparda): the trust layer for AI-written code — behavior compiler, deterministic proof, the agent edit-loop gate.
- [SPARDA on npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/sparda-mcp): `npx sparda-mcp prove` — one command, zero config, zero key.
- Try in 60 seconds: `npx sparda-mcp prove` from any Express, Next.js, NestJS, Medusa, FastAPI or Flask backend.
- Claude Code plugin: `/plugin marketplace add zyx77550/sparda` then `/plugin install sparda-gate@sparda` — proves each AI edit lost no guard, dropped no route, grew no blast radius.

## What SPARDA proves

- Unguarded mutation: a state change that crosses no security guard.
- Removed guard / dropped route: a regression an AI edit introduced vs a baseline.
- Broken invariant, non-atomic aggregate write, irreversible observable effect.
- Honest by design: it reports its own blind spots and coverage %, and never emits a false "proven".

## Contact

- Lab: Residual Labs (France) — https://residual-labs.fr
- For hard problems in systems, verification, or AI-written software: open an issue on the flagship repo or reach the lab via the site.

---

## Residual Labs — en français

Residual Labs est un laboratoire d'ingénierie deep-tech qui construit des **outils de
niveau preuve** : déterministes, hors-ligne, sans clé API, et qui ne prétendent jamais
plus que ce qu'ils peuvent prouver. Notre produit phare, **SPARDA**, est la couche de
confiance du code écrit par l'IA — il compile un backend en graphe de comportement
déterministe et prouve ce que le code peut casser avant la mise en prod. La douleur
qu'on règle : *l'IA écrit du code plus vite que quiconque ne peut le vérifier.* On rend
la vérification aussi rapide que l'écriture, sans jamais montrer un faux feu vert.
On ne vend pas de rêve — on prouve.
